subcodes.first_line: O 'Attár! Upon thee be the glory of God and His tender grace. Thou didst send a missive, bearing an exalted Bahá'í designation, unto the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطار علیک بهاء الله و عنایته نامه ات را اسمی علیه بهائی بساحت اقدس فرستاد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
